title: Facilitator Guide — Day 17 — Talent Growth Engine
prepChecklist: Confirm Playbook Week 4 Day 2 mission is live for interns
Brief mentors: morning is capacity + engine shift; afternoon is stage redesign workshop + squad share

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Scenes 1–3 — One advisor vs enterprise, capacity limits, redesign thinking
sessionFlow.notes: Discussion: Can one advisor build a great venture and enterprise alone?

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Scenes 4 & 6 — Brainstorm levers, Advisor Engine → Growth Engine
sessionFlow.notes: Poll room on capacity constraints. Walk Today vs Tomorrow flow.

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Scenes 5 & 7 — 5× Challenge + Growth Engine Canvas
sessionFlow.notes: Set bold 5× vision. Introduce 8 stages. Discuss where AI/tech helps most.
20 min squad work. Four inputs: stage, bottleneck, solution, impact.

sessionFlow.activity: Scene 9 — Squad stage presentations (3 min each)
sessionFlow.notes: Present → Listen → Connect. Capture themes on board.

sessionFlow.activity: Scenes 10–12 — Connect the engine, leadership multiplier
sessionFlow.notes: Walk full 10-stage engine. Leadership leverage math.
Leadership multiplier + what connects to tomorrow.

debriefQuestions: Where is our bottleneck right now?
Which lever gives the biggest breakthrough?
How do our redesigned stages connect into one engine?
If leadership is the multiplier, how many leaders does your engine need?
commonPitfalls: Treating this as hiring more people instead of redesigning the system
Picking a stage without naming a specific bottleneck
Presenting features instead of expected impact
coachingTips: Celebrate bold 5× visions — constrain later, dream first
Push squads to own one stage deeply rather than skimming all eight
